army_rules.name: Synapse
army_rules.description: If your Army Faction is TYRANIDS , while a TYRANIDS unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly SYNAPSE models, that TYRANIDS unit is said to be within Synapse Range of that model and of your army. While a TYRANIDS unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army: Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test , take that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6. Each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

army_rules.name: Shadow in the Warp
army_rules.description: If your Army Faction is TYRANIDS , once per battle, in either player’s Command phase , if one or more units from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a Battle-shock test . Each time an enemy unit takes such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one or more SYNAPSE units from your army, subtract 1 from that test.

rule.name: Hyper-adaptations
rule.description: At the start of the first battle round , select one of the following Hyper-adaptations to be active for TYRANIDS units from your army until the end of the battle: Swarming Instincts Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets an INFANTRY or SWARM unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Hyper-aggression Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Hive Predators Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, on a Critical Hit , that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Alien Cunning
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three TYRANIDS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Perfectly Adapted
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll , one Wound roll , one Damage roll, one Advance roll , one Charge roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Linchpin
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of the bearer, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

enhancements.name: Adaptive Biology
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. At the start of any turn, if the bearer has fewer than its starting number of wounds remaining, until the end of the battle, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

stratagems.name: RAPID REGENERATION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.
stratagems.fluff: Prey stare in horror as chitinous armour regrows and flesh, muscle and sinew knots back together.

stratagems.name: ADRENAL SURGE
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army and are eligible to fight, or one other TYRANIDS unit from your army that is eligible to fight.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in any of those selected units makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
stratagems.fluff: These warrior organisms destroy all as their adrenaline surges.

stratagems.name: DEATH FRENZY
stratagems.when: Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed , if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks , and is then removed from play.
stratagems.fluff: Tyranids care nothing for self-preservation, lashing out even in death.

stratagems.name: OVERRUN
stratagems.when: Fight phase , just before a TYRANIDS unit from your army Consolidates .
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" as long as your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, instead of making that Consolidation move , it can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.fluff: Tyranids in battle form an unstoppable avalanche of flesh and chitin that buries the foe alive.

stratagems.name: PREDATORY IMPERATIVE
stratagems.when: Your Command phase .
stratagems.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other TYRANIDS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Hyper-adaptation . Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hyper-adaptation is active for those selected units in addition to any other that may be active for your army.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot select the same Hyper-adaptation you selected at the start of the first battle round .
stratagems.fluff: Guided by the instincts of leader-beasts, the swarm can be tasked with focusing its hunting instincts.

stratagems.name: ENDLESS SWARM
stratagems.when: Your Command phase .
stratagems.target: Up to two ENDLESS MULTITUDE units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: You can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to each of the selected units.
stratagems.fluff: As the battle rages, more organisms pour in to bolster the swarms.

rule.name: Enraged Behemoths
rule.description: Each time a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength , and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength . In addition, while a TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is at its Starting Strength, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

enhancements.name: Ominous Presence
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. Add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

enhancements.name: Enraged Reserves
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enhancements.name: Null Nodules
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. Once per battle, when a Psychic Attack is allocated to the bearer, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

enhancements.name: Monstrous Nemesis
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS MONSTER model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Wound roll .

stratagems.name: CORROSIVE VISCERA
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that cannot FLY is destroyed .
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.
stratagems.fluff: Highly acidic fluids spray from the creature’s wounds, lethal to those nearby.

stratagems.name: RAMPAGING MONSTROSITIES
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: Tyranid monsters have reserves of energy that they unleash in waves of devastating fury.

stratagems.name: SAVAGE ROAR
stratagems.when: Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll . If that Battle-shock test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.fluff: This monster is even more terrifying to behold than other bioforms of its kind.

stratagems.name: UNTRAMMELLED FEROCITY
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move , it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so: It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them. It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after its unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, your unit is Battle-shocked .
stratagems.fluff: Encircling and entrapping such physically powerful and fearless beasts is nigh on impossible.

stratagems.name: SWARM-GUIDED SALVOES
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and until the end of the phase each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that model’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: One cannot hide from a gestalt entity with a million eyes, even in the densest cover.

stratagems.name: MASSIVE IMPACT
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase , just after a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army ends a Charge move .
stratagems.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your model and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound .
stratagems.fluff: Employing their sheer bulk and vicious chitinous horns and spikes, the largest Tyranids crash headlong through the foe, often with devastating results.

rule.name: Insurmountable Odds
rule.description: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has finished making its attacks, if one or more models from one or more ENDLESS MULTITUDE units from your army were destroyed as a result of those attacks, each such unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: that unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but that unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT ). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of enemy units. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked .

enhancements.name: Relentless Hunger
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Naturalised Camouflage
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. At the start of the first battle round , select up to three friendly ENDLESS MULTITUDE units within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the battle round, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Piercing Talons
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound , improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

enhancements.name: Adrenalised Onslaught
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Piles In or Consolidates , models in this unit can move an additional 3".

stratagems.name: SYNAPTIC GOADING
stratagems.when: Any phase, just before an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army makes a Surge move.
stratagems.target: That ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit.
stratagems.effect: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit moves, and your unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker (instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit]. All other rules for making Surge moves still apply.
stratagems.fluff: For a moment, a minuscule sliver of the Hive Mind’s ineffable will is focussed through these warrior organisms, driving them to pounce upon either valuable prey or else some vital strategic target.

stratagems.name: UNENDING WAVES
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was just destroyed . You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves , at its Starting Strength .
stratagems.restrictions: Any destroyed CHARACTER units that were attached to your unit are not returned. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.
stratagems.fluff: No matter how many warrior organisms are slain, more are already surging forward over their corpses.

stratagems.name: TEEMING MASSES
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll .
stratagems.fluff: Skittering, darting and pouring over one another, the Tyranids make for hard and confusing targets.

stratagems.name: SWARMING MASSES
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and If your unit contains 15 or more models, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
stratagems.fluff: The sheer weight of Tyranid numbers begins to tell as they bury their victims in lashing, biting horror.

stratagems.name: BOUNDING ADVANCE
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances , do not make an Advance roll . Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.
stratagems.fluff: Synaptic impulses from the Hive Mind urge greater speed from the swarm’s warrior organisms.

stratagems.name: PRESERVATION IMPERATIVE
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is treated as containing fewer than five models for the purpose of the [BLAST] ability.
stratagems.fluff: Triggered by incoming projectile fire, a synaptic pulse spurs the danger-senses of lesser warrior organisms and causes them to scatter like a shoal evading predators. Only once the explosions have stopped and the dust cleared do the bioforms bunch up once again.

rule.name: Feed the Swarm
rule.description: In your Command phase , each HARVESTER unit from your army can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit that is within 6" of it. A unit can only be regenerated once per phase. Each time a unit regenerates, do one of the following: One model in that unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds. One destroyed INFANTRY model (excluding CHARACTERS ) is returned to that unit with its full wounds remaining. If that unit is an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit, up to 3 destroyed models are returned instead.

enhancements.name: Regenerating Monstrosity
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only (excluding MONSTERS models). The bearer’s unit can be regenerated up to twice per phase, instead of once.

enhancements.name: Instinctive Defence
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly HARVESTER units, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP. In addition, while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly HARVESTER units, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

enhancements.name: Biophagic Flow (Aura)
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While a friendly HARVESTER model is within 12" of the bearer, when using the Feed the Swarm ability, that HARVESTER model can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit that is within 9" of it, instead of one within 6".

enhancements.name: Parasitic Biomorphology
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. The first time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly HARVESTER units, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

stratagems.name: BROODGUARD IMPULSE
stratagems.when: Any phase.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that was just destroyed . You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your HARVESTER unit, add 1 to the Wound roll .
stratagems.fluff: Should a foe successfully slay one of the swarm’s assimilation organisms, they only mark themselves as a priority for predation and consumption in turn.

stratagems.name: RECLAIM BIOMASS
stratagems.when: Any phase, when a TYRANIDS unit from your army is destroyed , before the last model in it is removed from play.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that is within 6" of that destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit within 6" of your HARVESTER unit (See Feed the Swarm ).
stratagems.fluff: Dead Tyranids are consumed and reconstituted by the swarm just as readily as the lifeless carcasses of their prey.

stratagems.name: TYRANNOFORMED
stratagems.when: Command phase .
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.
stratagems.fluff: Swarms of diminutive Tyranid phage organisms carpet even the most vital strategic assets, steadily breaking them down for assimilation.

stratagems.name: ABLATIVE CARAPACE
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If your unit is within range of an objective marker you control, until the end of the phase models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.
stratagems.fluff: These organisms have employed consumed minerals to exude an additional hardened protective layer over their chitinous armour.

stratagems.name: SECURE BIOMASS
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a HARVESTER unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit as well.
stratagems.fluff: When rich sources of biomass are identified the warrior organisms of this swarm will stop at nothing to destroy resistance and claim them.

stratagems.name: RAPACIOUS HUNGER
stratagems.when: Your Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that just destroyed an enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit immediately Regenerates (See Feed the Swarm ). When doing so, if your unit is a HARVESTER unit and you choose for one model to regain up to D3 lost wounds, that model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.
stratagems.fluff: The hunger of the Tyranids can never be satiated.

rule.name: Questing Tendrils
rule.description: TYRANIDS units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Fell Back . VANGUARD INVADER units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Advanced .

enhancements.name: Hunting Grounds
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit must take a Battle-shock test .

enhancements.name: Chameleonic
enhancements.description: VANGUARD INVADER model only. The bearer has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets the bearer’s unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

enhancements.name: Stalker
enhancements.description: VANGUARD INVADER model only. At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll .

enhancements.name: Neuronode
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three VANGUARD INVADER units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves , regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

stratagems.name: SURPRISE ASSAULT
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after a VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: That VANGUARD INVADER unit.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that was selected as the target of one or more of your unit’s attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test . Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll . If the Battle-shock test was failed, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.fluff: Vanguard organisms strike from unexpected quarters with calculated and emotionless alien savagery that is appalling to behold.

stratagems.name: ASSASSIN BEASTS
stratagems.when: Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One VANGUARD INVADER INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.
stratagems.fluff: These bioforms have been adapted to strike with pinpoint precision at the pre-assessed weak points of selected prey that require elimination.

stratagems.name: SEEDED BROODS
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is in Reserves , or up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army that are in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up those selected units on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.
stratagems.fluff: Warrior organisms erupt from concealment straight into advanced positions.

stratagems.name: HYPERSENSORY SCILLIA
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move .
stratagems.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army that are within 9" of that enemy unit, or one other TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Those selected units can each make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.fluff: Hissing clusters of scillia warn of the slightest prey movements, allowing the Tyranids to react.

stratagems.name: UNSEEN LURKERS
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.fluff: Hyper-attuned senses warn vanguard organisms when they are being targeted by the prey.

stratagems.name: INVISIBLE HUNTER
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase .
stratagems.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army, or one TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves .
stratagems.restrictions: The targeted units must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.
stratagems.fluff: Hunter-slayer organisms can melt away before the eyes of their foes, only to strike from a new direction.

rule.name: Synaptic Imperatives
rule.description: At the start of the battle round , you can select one of the Synaptic Imperatives shown below. Until the end of the battle round, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your army and while a TYRANIDS unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army, it will benefit from it. Each Synaptic Imperative can only be selected once per battle. Synaptic Augmentation: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save . Surging Vitality: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit. Goaded to Slaughter: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll .

enhancements.name: Power of the Hive Mind
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS PSYKER model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of psychic weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

enhancements.name: Psychostatic Disruption
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS SYNAPSE model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or second battle round , when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves , the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

enhancements.name: Synaptic Control
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS SYNAPSE model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

enhancements.name: The Dirgeheart of Kharis (Aura)
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS SYNAPSE model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen that units Leadership characteristic by 1.

stratagems.name: THE SMOTHERING SHADOW
stratagems.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test .
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army within 12" of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound .
stratagems.fluff: In the heart of the swarms, the Shadow in the Warp can literally kill with its smothering power.

stratagems.name: SYNAPTIC CHANNELLING
stratagems.when: Command phase .
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, while a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of the selected unit, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.
stratagems.fluff: Tyranids are one with the Hive Mind; individuality is a disadvantage that they surpass.

stratagems.name: IRRESISTIBLE WILL
stratagems.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the SYNAPSE unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the attacking model’s unit is within 6" of your SYNAPSE unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
stratagems.fluff: Whether paralysing its prey or forcing them to stumble out of cover with its force of will, or else puppeteering nearby warrior organisms, the leader-beast ensures the prey targets are struck down.

stratagems.name: REINFORCED HIVE NODE
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One SYNAPSE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.fluff: Psionic shielding crackles around these leader-beasts, helping to ensure their survival.

stratagems.name: IMPERATIVE DOMINANCE
stratagems.when: Your Command phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one Synaptic Imperative , even if you have already selected that imperative this battle. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your unit instead of any other Synaptic Imperative that is active for your army.
stratagems.fluff: At need, the focused will of the Tyranid leader-beasts can goad warrior organisms to exhibit strategically beneficial behaviours at the instant they are needed most.

stratagems.name: OVERRIDE INSTINCTS
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army and made a Fall Back move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge this turn.
stratagems.fluff: The seemingly omniscient Hive Mind processes the sensory input of its swarms at an impossible rate, and compels its broods to react accordingly.

rule.name: Surprise Assault
rule.description: Each time a TYRANIDS model from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. Each time a BURROWER unit from your army is set up on the battlefield from Reserves , place a circular 40mm Tunnel Marker anywhere on the battlefield within 1" of that unit and more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units. In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase , when you set up a unit on the battlefield from Reserves, you can set that unit up wholly within 9" of one of your Tunnel Markers and more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy units. If an enemy model (excluding AIRCRAFT ) ends any kind of move within 3" of one of your Tunnel Markers, that Tunnel Marker is removed from the battlefield. KEYWORDS MAWLOC and TRYGON units from your army have the BURROWER keyword. In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to 2 TRYGON models from your army. The selected units gain the CHARACTER keyword. Designer’s Note: This means that the selected models can be given Enhancements and one of them can be selected as your WARLORD .

enhancements.name: Synaptic Strategy
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Tremor Senses
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three friendly TYRANIDS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves , regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Vanguard Intellect
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase , regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Trygon Prime
enhancements.description: TRYGON model only. The bearer gains the SYNAPSE keyword. Improve the Strength and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

stratagems.name: ADAPTIVE OPTIMISATION
stratagems.when: Command phase .
stratagems.target: One MAWLOC or TRYGON unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your unit has the SYNAPSE keyword.
stratagems.fluff: On occasions where subterranean assaults are deemed tactically useful, the hive mind may spontaneously alter its burrowing organisms, enabling them to act as beacons for its will.

stratagems.name: REPLENISHING SWARMS
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army, wholly within 9" of one or more Tunnel Markers you placed.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds, or you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models with a Wounds characteristic of 1 to your unit, with their full wounds remaining, instead.
stratagems.fluff: Scrambling through the tunnels come endless multitudes of warrior-beasts and harvester bioforms, spilling out of the depths to reinforce the teeming masses.

stratagems.name: ENFILADING EMERGENCE
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of your next Fight phase , weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.
stratagems.fluff: Emerging from the depths, Tyranid bioforms level their weapon morphs and spit hissing volleys of living ammunition into the exposed backs of outflanked prey.

stratagems.name: TUNNEL NETWORK
stratagems.when: End of your Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more of your Tunnel Markers and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again, wholly within 9" of another Tunnel Marker you placed, and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
stratagems.fluff: Taking advantage of freshly burrowed tunnels, Tyranid bioforms move swiftly across the landscape, emerging in unexpected locations.

stratagems.name: SWARMING ASSAULT
stratagems.when: Your Charge phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, friendly TYRANIDS units within 6" of your unit can re-roll Charge rolls .
stratagems.fluff: A hive fleet’s vanguard organisms favour mobility and aggression, keeping the foe on the back foot with repeated coordinated assaults.

stratagems.name: RETREAT BELOW
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS unit or up to two BURROWER units from your army that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves .
stratagems.fluff: The network of tunnels beneath the battlefield enables Tyranid organisms to retreat from the foe and prepare further ambushes.

rule.name: Leader-beasts
rule.description: TYRANID WARRIORS (see below) and WINGED TYRANID PRIME units from your army have a 5+ invulnerable save . KEYWORDS TYRANID WARRIORS WITH RANGED BIO-WEAPONS and TYRANID WARRIORS WITH MELEE BIO-WEAPONS units from your army gain the TYRANID WARRIORS and BATTLELINE keywords, and while such a unit is not Battle-shocked , TYRANID WARRIORS models in that unit have an Objective Control characteristic of 3.
keywords_mentioned: TYRANID WARRIORS MELEE BIO-WEAPONS TYRANID WARRIORS

enhancements.name: Hunting Grounds
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit must take a Battle-shock test .
keyword_restrictions: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS
keywords_mentioned: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS

enhancements.name: Psychostatic Disruption
enhancements.description: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS SYNAPSE model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or second battle round , when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves , the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.
keyword_restrictions: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS SYNAPSE
keywords_mentioned: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS SYNAPSE

stratagems.name: HYPERADRENAL REFLEXES
stratagems.when: Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One GREAT DEVOURER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save .
stratagems.fluff: Goaded by the biostimulants surging through their bodies, these warrior organisms evade their enemies'attacks with unbelievable swiftness.

stratagems.name: PERVASIVE DREAD
stratagems.when: Fight phase , just after the enemy WARLORD is destroyed (and is not returned to the battlefield) by a GREAT DEVOURER unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That GREAT DEVOURER unit.
stratagems.effect: In your opponent’s next Command phase , each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a Battle-shock test , subtracting 1 from the result. This Stratagem cannot cause a unit to take two Battle-shock tests in the same phase.
stratagems.fluff: With the death of their leader, the surviving prey feel an ominous sense of doom press down upon them, heightened by subtle psionic assault.

stratagems.name: HUNTING GROUNDS
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase , just after a GREAT DEVOURER unit from your army opens a Hatchway .
stratagems.target: That GREAT DEVOURER unit.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 3", provided at least one of its models ends that move on the opposite side of that Hatchway from when your unit opened it.
stratagems.fluff: Genestealers on the hunt are relentless, squirming through hatches before they have even half opened.

stratagems.name: OUTFLANK
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase .
stratagems.target: One GENESTEALERS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that is wholly within an Entry Zone.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves . It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase . When doing so, if it was within one of your Entry Zones when it was removed, it must be set up wholly within another one of your Entry Zones. If it was within one of your opponent’s Entry Zones when it was removed, it must be set up wholly within another one of your opponent’s Entry Zones instead. If this is not possible, your unit is destroyed .
stratagems.fluff: Swarms of Genestealers crawl through vents and ducts as they seek to outflank their prey.

stratagems.name: UNSEEN LURKERS
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.fluff: Hyper-attuned senses warn vanguard organisms when they are being targeted by the prey.

stratagems.name: RAPID REGENERATION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase , just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.target: One TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.
stratagems.fluff: Prey stare in horror as chitinous armour regrows and flesh, muscle and sinew knots back together.
keywords_mentioned: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS
target_keywords: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS

stratagems.name: RECLAIM BIOMASS
stratagems.when: Any phase, when a TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS unit from your army is destroyed , before the last model in it is removed from play.
stratagems.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that is within 6" of that destroyed unit.
stratagems.effect: Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS unit within 6" of your HARVESTER unit (See Feed the Swarm ).
stratagems.fluff: Dead Tyranids are consumed and reconstituted by the swarm just as readily as the lifeless carcasses of their prey.
keywords_mentioned: TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS
TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS TYRANIDS HARVESTER

stratagems.name: SYNAPTIC GOADING
stratagems.when: Any phase, just before an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army makes a Surge move.
stratagems.target: That ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit.
stratagems.effect: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit moves, and your unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker (instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit]. All other rules for making Surge moves still apply.
stratagems.fluff: For a moment, a minuscule sliver of the Hive Mind’s ineffable will is focussed through these warrior organisms, driving them to pounce upon either valuable prey or else some vital strategic target.

stratagems.name: INSANE BRAVERY
stratagems.when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase , just before you take a Battle-shock test for a unit from your army.
stratagems.target: That unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit automatically passes that Battle-shock test.
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.
stratagems.fluff: Indifferent to their own survival, these warriors hold their ground against seemingly impossible odds.

stratagems.name: HEROIC INTERVENTION
stratagems.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase , just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move .
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.restrictions: You can only select a VEHICLE unit from your army if it is a WALKER . Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.
stratagems.fluff: Voices raised in furious war cries, your warriors surge forth to meet the enemy’s onslaught head-on.

stratagems.name: RAPID INGRESS
stratagems.when: End of your opponent’s Movement phase .
stratagems.target: One unit from your army that is in Reserves .
stratagems.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, and if every model in that unit has the Deep Strike ability, you can set that unit up as described in the Deep Strike ability (even though it is not your Movement phase).
stratagems.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem to enable a unit to arrive on the battlefield during a battle round it would not normally be able to do so in.
stratagems.fluff: Be it cunning strategy, potent technology or supernatural ritual, there are many means by which a commander may hasten their warriors’ onset.
